Product Guide: Fusion TUIComponent ID: F-UI-TUIClassification: Observability InterfaceAuthor: UX/UI Team1. Vision & PurposeThe Fusion TUI is a zero-allocation, immediate-mode terminal interface built directly into the Unified Monolith. It allows developers to visualize the internal state of the Reactor and HAFT engines without external tools.2. Technical SpecsReplaces: tui-rs, ratatui.Performance: Renders at 60FPS with <1% CPU overhead.Memory: Uses a pre-allocated buffer in the nucleus Arena; never calls malloc during a draw call.3. Key ViewsScheduler Heatmap: Live visualization of core utilization.Flux Monitor: Real-time sequence tracking for ring buffers.Tensor Inspect: Visualizes HAFT tensor shapes and memory layouts.4. Why this existsTo provide "Dashboard Zero"—a monitoring solution that works even if the network or disk is failing, as it is embedded in the binary itself.
